case_title: CALIFORNIA RAINGUARD INC VS. MARIA REYES-VANEGAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00) SERVED FEB-19-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REYES-VANEGAS, MARIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA RAINGUARD INC AS TO DEFENDANT REYES-VANEGAS, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA RAINGUARD INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-18-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "FOR TRIAL--DEFENDANT WANTS TO PURSUE A CLAIM AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF DESPITE THE MEDIATION AGREEMENT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSIED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. MEDIATED DISPOSITION.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGIE JO SOLIZ--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
